title: Brazilian Toasted Eggplant
description: A flavorful and savory Brazilian-inspired dish featuring toasted eggplant, sweet ingredients, and a hint of mild spices.

ingredients.name: Brazilian
ingredients.notes: Use Brazilian-style olive oil for authentic flavor

ingredients.name: Toast
ingredients.notes: Use crusty bread for best results

instructions: Cut the eggplant into 1/2-inch thick slices.
Brush both sides of the eggplant slices with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Place the eggplant slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
While the eggplant is roasting, toast the bread slices until lightly browned.
Heat the honey in a small saucepan over low heat until warm and runny.
To assemble the dish, place a toasted bread slice on a plate, top with a roasted eggplant slice, and drizzle with honey.
Serve immediately and garnish with frozen peas.
Repeat with remaining ingredients to serve four.
